summary: This is a brief promotional announcement for Fog Creek Software's consulting services. Joel announces that Fog Creek is expanding and invites readers to consider hiring them for custom software development. The post is essentially an advertisement rather than a substantive blog entry.
key_points: Fog Creek Software was expanding its business in late 2000
The company offered custom software development consulting services
Joel used his blog as a marketing channel for his company
money_quotes: From the blatant self-promotion department: Fog Creek Software is expanding!
key_insight: A 26-word self-promotional note announcing Fog Creek Software's expansion and consulting availability, notable mainly as a historical marker of the company's early growth.
